title: Right At Home-Midland Clermont House w/ Pool and Billiards
tagline: Vacation home in Midland with a fitness center and an outdoor pool

pets: 2 pets total (up to 50 lbs per pet)

houseRules.events: Events allowed: family gatherings and birthday parties (max 22 attendees)
houseRules.pets: Dogs allowed: less than 23 kg per pet (limit 2 pets total)
checkOutInstructions: Turn off the lights, lock the doors and return the keys
additionalRules: For Extend Stays over 10 days The customer will be assessed an additional cleaning fee every 10 days for cleaning.
If pool is heated you agree to an additional 100 per day for the duration of stay and 18 hour notice to heat.

importantInfo: Extra-person charges may apply and vary depending on property policy
Government-issued photo identification and a credit card, debit card or cash deposit may be required at check-in for incidental charges
Special requests are subject to availability upon check-in and may incur additional charges; special requests cannot be guaranteed
Parties and events (including family gatherings and birthday parties) are allowed on site. Maximum attendees: 22
Host has not indicated whether there is a carbon monoxide detector on the property; consider bringing a portable detector with you on the trip
Host has not indicated whether there is a smoke detector on the property

list.author: Kasee P.
list.content: The house is big and the common areas are accommodating for a big family! I've stayed at

list.author: William S.
list.content: Great stay! Pool was very refreshing.

list.title: Large home - lots of room for family
list.author: John H.
list.content: Great house for a larger family(5 of us) to stay and enjoy each other's company. The swimming pool and large backyard is a big bonus. Manager was quick to answer questions and flexible with our needs. Highly recommend staying here.

list.author: Michelle K.
list.content: the kitchen had plenty of cooking utensils, but there was dirty dishes in the oven and microwave, floors were really dirty, master bathtub was dirty and hair in it, the back yard was junky with dead bushes, trashn not upkept at all, the garage had an extra fridge which was nice but the garage is full of junk and just a total disaster.

list.title: Fourth of July weekend
list.author: Margarita Gutierrez G.
list.content: Good weekend having fun cooking out and enjoying the sun near the pool just getting to enjoy family

list.title: Family Time
list.author: Sue Beth J.
list.content: This is a yearly golf tournament for our families and friends to catch up and have fun, It was great to have a place for our group to stay together, cool off in the pool, and make more memories, Thanks again

list.author: Jack L C.
list.content: Everything was functional. Rooms and climate conditions were comfortable. Spacious. Bathrooms and kitchen were clean. Pool was refreshing and served its purpose. Made for a comfortable place for family members from Iowa and Virginia to converge for visit with family in Midland.

list.title: Great stay
list.author: Damon T.
list.content: Cozie and comfortable, nice space and area to let the dogs outside

list.title: 3 day visit
list.author: Brentley T.
list.content: The property was everything the pictures showed to be and more. Our host responded back to us very quickly. Couldn't have asked for a better place to stay. Really nice place!

list.title: Perfect.
list.author: Collin K.
list.content: This property is amazing!! We just wanted a little "stay-cation", and this place was great for that! Thank you! Everyone has a great time.

list.title: Home away from home
list.author: Susan D.
list.content: Great house…great space…great time!

list.title: Wonderful home
list.author: Christy A.
list.content: Celebrated my daughters Birthday with a swim party and grilled burgers and hot dogs. We loved the home and had a wonderful time.

list.author: Gerald W.
list.content: The home could be really really nice. Tons of maintenance needed from little things like light bulbs and toilet paper fixtures to range hood and paint (indoor and out) landscaping was all over grown and the pool needed to be vacuumed. Overall it was ok it seems as though it's not being properly taken care of.

list.author: Katherine B.
list.content: The house was wonderful. We had a little trouble with the AC that we did realize until late Saturday evening due to being at a Wedding all day. But the owner responded quickly and let us know what we needed to do. The home was very roomy and there was enough for everyone to do with the pool, darts and pool table.

list.title: Beautiful house
list.author: Noe' C.
list.content: Everything was great the house the town the neighborhood,all facilities near. 100% recommended.

list.title: Post Thanksgiving R&R
list.author: Libby R.
list.content: The home and outdoor area was spotless and beautifully furnished. And the Christmas tree was a pleasant surprise! The ease of reaching out to the host was seamless.

list.title: Great home
list.author: Jennifer B.
list.content: We rented so we had a place to stay as we were in town for funeral and the normal family we stay with were out of room! This home is an older home with a lot of charm and was great for entertaining some family that stoped by to see us that wouldn't be at the funeral. We were grateful for the family friendly environment with plenty of places for a large group to hang out! There was 8 of us that stay and total counting babies for dinner was 18.

list.title: Nice space poorly maintained
list.author: Ann C.
list.content: Let's start with the positive. Plenty of space to spread out. Well stocked kitchen. Lots of plates, silverware, wine glasses, etc. We had 20 for dinner and no one felt crowded. The backyard was huge and the pool was great. The bedrooms that were additions to the home offered separation from the other three bedrooms. Unfortunately, these bedrooms were the only access points to the backyard. This made it a little difficult because the family members using these rooms were working during our stay. The house was not well maintained. The garbage disposal was not working and the host failed to fix it during our stay. The house was not ready when we arrived. We were not able to get in until 4:40...delaying our dinner plans with the family.

list.title: Lots of potential
list.author: Crystal S.
list.content: This house has so much potential, but needs lots of loving. We booked mainly for the pool table, hot tub, and darts but we're unable to use any. The pool table had steak bones and limes all over and under from previous tenants, we cleaned that up.. there were not any darts to be able to use the dart board… jacuzzi was dirty. There were also wasp nests outside… spider webs in multiple rooms as well as spiders and beetles. One of the beds had bugs in the bed so a 5 bedroom home turned into a 3 bedroom, we ended up having to use the couches to sleep on. 12 people also had to share one shower due to plumbing issues leaving 1 restroom completely unusable. Layers of dust and webs on light fixtures in the kitchen as well. We also washed the sheets prior to using due to the smell they had. The house is beautiful, but you can see it is rarely really cleaned.

list.author: Crystal M.
list.content: The pool was beautiful and relaxing. The living room, dining are and kitchen were large enough for our entire family to hang out without feeling crowded.

description:
Welcome to this spacious home with room for everybody, including privacy and common spaces both inside and out. The backyard features a pool that can be heated for an additional expense that is shallow size for volleyball and basketball. There's also a large grassy area for pets and of course a covered patio with pool table darts, and seating. In addition to the outside the home is just as spacious with two living rooms, an open concept for dining within the kitchen as well as five bedrooms there's smart TVs in all the rooms and main areas to enjoy.

Our prices include all fees. No hidden fees.
